product_overview: Report Maker is a sub-module of QA-Analyzer that lets authorized trainers generate AI-narrated QA evaluation reports (.docx) for services or individual agents, including client-rendered charts embedded as images. The app also provides a QA Dashboard to explore Pareto and Donut visualizations for quick executive insights.
core_goals: Generate downloadable .docx QA reports (Service or Individual) with AI narration and embedded charts
Allow users to choose an AI model from available providers (Gemini, OpenRouter) for narrative generation
Preview and include Pareto and Donut chart images rendered client-side in generated reports
Download ephemeral report files securely and track report generation history
Explore QA findings interactively on the QA Dashboard by date range and team

features.name: Report Maker
features.description: Create AI-narrated QA evaluation reports in .docx format (Service or Individual) with client-rendered chart images and secure ephemeral file delivery.
user_flows: Navigate to /qa-analyzer/reports -> Select report type: Service -> Select service type and date range -> Optionally select team filter -> Select AI model -> Submit report generation request -> Client renders Pareto and Donut charts to images and includes them in the request -> Receive confirmation that the report is ready with a download link -> Download the .docx report

Navigate to /qa-analyzer/reports -> Select report type: Individual -> Search for and select an agent -> Select date range -> Select AI model -> Submit report generation request -> Client renders trend chart to image and includes it in the request -> Receive confirmation that the report is ready with a download link -> Download the .docx report

Navigate to /qa-analyzer/reports -> Select report type: Service -> Leave one or more required fields empty -> Attempt to submit report generation request -> See validation message prompting to complete required fields

Navigate to /qa-analyzer/reports -> Complete form with valid filters and select AI model -> Submit report generation request after creating 10 reports in the last 24 hours -> See message that daily report generation limit has been reached

features.name: QA Dashboard
features.description: Interactive executive summary dashboard that visualizes QA findings with Pareto and Donut charts and supports filtering by date range and team.
user_flows: Navigate to /qa-analyzer/dashboard -> Select date range -> Select team filter -> See Pareto and Donut charts update to reflect the selected filters -> Review executive summary metrics

routes.description: Report Maker for generating Word reports with AI

features.name: Report Maker
features.description: Create automated QA evaluation reports in .docx format with AI narration and chart captures.
user_interactions: Select service type and date range

features.name: QA Dashboard
features.description: Visualize QA findings with Pareto and Donut charts.
